lifecycleNotes.taught: Socratic session complete; every checklist item demonstrated
lifecycleNotes.spec'd: HANDOFF.md written (delegated builds only) — not required for this lesson
lifecycleNotes.built: not applicable — no delegated build for this lesson
lifecycleNotes.done: all required artifacts exist and verified on disk

gates: a lesson may not be marked done without its required artifacts on disk

cursor.nextAction: Run the Socratic teaching session against checklist.md, logging one raw-notes.md entry per exchange.

lessons.title: Backlog.md — Effective Use & SpecKit Integration
lessons.motivator: User wants a working overview of Backlog.md and wants to explore whether SpecKit's spec-driven approach (spec.md/plan.md/tasks.md, constitution.md) could be layered onto Backlog.md's own docs/decisions scaffolding.
openThreads: Backlog.md already has docs/ and decisions/ folders — how much of SpecKit's spec->plan->tasks pipeline is redundant vs. additive?
